revenue: $1.84 billion (3-month YoY comparison obscured in filing; 6-month revenue down 4.7% YoY to $3.51 billion)
key_metrics: Operating Income: $200 million (down 47.9% YoY from $384 million)
Share Repurchases: $377 million executed during the quarter
Operating Cash Flow (6-month): $147 million (down 58.5% YoY from $354 million)
qoq_changes: Net income declined sequentially to $137 million from an implied $201 million in the prior quarter.
Cash and cash equivalents decreased to $1.15 billion from $2.14 billion at the end of the prior fiscal year (March 31, 2025).
new_risks: Significant margin compression driven by rising R&D ($686 million) and marketing ($304 million) expenses.
Deteriorating operating cash flow, which fell sharply YoY for the six-month period due to working capital changes and lower net income.
management_tone: Cautious; while the company continues aggressive capital returns through buybacks and dividends, rising operating expenses are severely compressing margins and operating cash flow.
analyst_note: EA is facing notable profitability headwinds as elevated R&D and marketing spend drove a 53% YoY decline in quarterly net income and a nearly 48% drop in operating income. Despite top-line and margin pressures, management remains committed to shareholder returns, executing $377 million in buybacks during the quarter to help support EPS.
